---
title: "Giarda, Giovanni"			#add name and title here
description: "PhD student"				#Postdoc, PhD student, ...
image: images/giovanni-giarda.jpg			#insert link to image
categories: [research, all]				#pi | all
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    #see a list of available icons here: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ggiarda@phys.ethz.ch	#add email here
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ggiarda			#add github page here
    - icon: globe
      text: Homepage
      href: "#"					#add personal homepage here

						#add other information

#add Description about yourself here
---
Giovanni is a PhD student in the Gravitational Physics Group at ETH Zürich. Since joining the Swiss LISA Data Processing Center in 2025, he has been developing machine learning and statistical inference methods for gravitational-wave data analysis, with a particular focus on simulation-based transdimensional inference and neural source-separation techniques.
